name: Macola ERP API (Exact Software)
what_it_does: Macola ERP REST and SOAP APIs for mid-market manufacturing and distribution businesses. Enables AI agents to manage production order and work order lifecycle for manufacturing execution, handle inventory and warehouse management for distribution operations, access accounts receivable and payable workflow for financial management, retrieve bill of materials and product structure data for manufacturing engineering, manage customer order management and shipping for order fulfillment, handle purchasing and supplier management for procurement automation, access job costing and project accounting for manufacturing financial management, retrieve MRP data for demand planning, manage quality control and inspection workflow, and integrate Macola ERP data with Salesforce, Magento, and third-party logistics platforms.
use_cases: Automating production orders from manufacturing planning agents
Managing inventory from distribution warehouse agents
Processing customer orders from order management agents
Synchronizing ERP data with CRM from Salesforce integration agents
not_for: Enterprise-scale manufacturers requiring SAP or Oracle ERP capabilities
Process manufacturing without discrete manufacturing focus
Cloud-first architectures without on-premises ERP tolerance
best_when: A mid-market discrete manufacturer or distributor using Macola ERP wants AI agents to automate production orders, inventory management, customer order fulfillment, and financial reporting integrated with existing Macola workflows.
avoid_when: INTEGRATION RISK: Macola uses both REST and legacy SOAP APIs; newer REST API coverage is incomplete — some manufacturing functions require SOAP, creating mixed-protocol integration complexity. Macola on-premises deployments require network access configuration for agent connectivity. Version fragmentation between Macola 10, ES, and Progression creates API surface differences.

auth.notes: Macola uses API key and basic authentication. No OAuth 2.0. On-premises deployment with optional cloud hosting. Exact Software (Netherlands HQ, Delft). Macola acquired by Exact from Activant Solutions. Exact is private equity backed (KKR). Macola serves 3,000+ mid-market manufacturers and distributors primarily in North America. Macola 10 is the current version. Strong in electronics, industrial equipment, and consumer goods manufacturing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription plus implementation
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user; implementation and customization fees
pricing.notes: Delft, Netherlands (Exact HQ). Macola division in Ohio. KKR-backed private equity. Macola acquired from Activant Solutions (2012). 3,000+ mid-market customers. Competes with Epicor P21, Sage 300, and Global Shop Solutions for mid-market manufacturing ERP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits vary by deployment; on-premises limits server-dependent

known_agent_gotchas: INTEGRATION RISK: Mixed REST and SOAP APIs — newer Macola REST API is incomplete; manufacturing-specific operations may require legacy SOAP endpoints creating dual-protocol integration complexity
On-premises deployment — most Macola installations are on-premises; agent connectivity requires VPN or network exposure configuration not typical for cloud APIs
Version fragmentation — Macola 10, Macola ES, and Macola Progression have different API surfaces; verify which version customer runs before integration
No webhooks — Macola lacks native event webhooks; agents must poll for changes creating latency in event-driven workflows
Exact Software parent changes — Macola is one of many Exact products; product investment and API development may lag behind Exact's cloud-first products
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mid-market manufacturing ERP. SOC2. API key/basic auth. US/EU. Manufacturing production and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mid-market ERP. SOC2. API key/basic. US/EU. Manufacturing and financial data.
